geography.data_source: Greater Chennai Corporation ward map 2022, GCC boundary shapefiles for OMR IT corridor, CMDA master plan zone delineation

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Chennai/Kancheepuram district tables, rapid growth estimated at 4.5% CAGR post-2015 IT expansion

income_profile.data_source: NASSCOM Tamil Nadu IT industry report 2023, PLFS 2022-23, Glassdoor/AmbitionBox Chennai IT salary surveys, adjusted for OMR IT park concentration

commute_profile.data_source: CMP Chennai 2018 mode share, OMR traffic study 2022, CMRL Phase 2 planning documents noting absence of metro on OMR as of 2024

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from high-income IT corridor behaviour patterns, very low fare sensitivity, high digital information diffusion, Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from IT corridor workplace network patterns, high digital connectivity but low cross-income interaction

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from OMR IT park food court and restaurant strip footfall surveys
Estimated from Sholinganallur junction commercial activity
Estimated from IT park entrance vendor clusters, dependent on tech worker footfall

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: IT Corridor template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable to OMR IT corridor character

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from NASSCOM Chennai chapter, IT park management bodies, reduced local politician density in newer development zone
